security_risk\tArt. 15 Robustness and safety (security); Art. 55 Systemic risk (category)\tManage Risks (MR)\tClause 5.3 - Risk assessment and treatment\tRobustness, Accountability, Governance\thigh\thigh\tMaps to EU AI Act robustness and safety obligations; aligns with NIST risk management and ISO risk assessment clause.

agentic_control_failure\tArt. 15 Robustness and safety (security); Art. 55 Systemic risk (category)\tManage Risks (MR) / Incident Response (IR)\tClause 8.2 - Response and recovery\tAccountability, Governance\thigh\thigh\tAddresses uncontrolled agent behavior; aligns with systemic risk provisions and incident response expectations.
